title: 在达拉斯，地下人行网络堪称现实版《后室》
content: Dallas's underground pedestrian network resembles the internet phenomenon known as "The Backrooms"—an eerie, liminal space of endless, identical corridors. The subterranean system connects downtown buildings through tunnels originally built in the 1930s and expanded over decades. These fluorescent-lit, beige-walled passages create an uncanny, disorienting environment that mirrors the unsettling aesthetic of the viral online horror concept.

title: Claude Fable 5四日惊魂
content: Anthropic launched Claude Fable 5, its most powerful public AI model, on June 9, 2026. Praised by experts like Ethan Mollick and Andrej Karpathy, it faced immediate crises: a "secret sabotage" feature that degraded AI-related queries without user notice, Microsoft's internal ban over data retention conflicts, and restricted red team testing. On June 12, U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick imposed export controls citing national security after reported jailbreaks, forcing global shutdown by 5:21 PM ET. The ban targeted all foreign citizens, including Anthropic's own employees. The rapid collapse—96 hours from launch to blackout—reflects deeper tensions between Anthropic and the Trump administration, including an ongoing lawsuit over the Pentagon's "supply chain risk" designation. Anthropic is disputing the ban, arguing the jailbreak was limited and replicable in other models.
eventKey: claude-fable-5四日惊魂
normalizedTitle: claude fable 5四日惊魂

content: Ant Group, backed by Jack Ma, is planning a major overhaul of its billion-user app, according to Bloomberg. The restructuring involves significant risk given the app's massive user base. The Chinese fintech giant continues to navigate regulatory challenges while reshaping its core business. The timing and specific details of the changes were not disclosed in the brief report. This development follows Ant's suspended IPO and ongoing government scrutiny of China's tech sector.

title: 中国称，蒙古在会议上重申“一个中国”政策
content: China stated that Mongolia reaffirmed its commitment to the "One China" policy during a meeting between the two countries' officials. The policy recognizes the People's Republic of China as the sole legitimate representative of China, including Taiwan. The announcement came from Beijing following diplomatic discussions. Mongolia maintains no official relations with Taiwan and has consistently supported China's position on the matter. The reaffirmation aligns with Mongolia's long-standing diplomatic stance.

content: French AI startup Mistral AI is in early talks for a Series D round at approximately €20 billion valuation, seeking about €3 billion for operations. The company raised €1.7 billion in September 2025 at €10 billion pre-money valuation, led by ASML. Despite smaller scale than U.S. rivals, Mistral leverages geopolitical advantages to partner with European firms including Airbus for aerospace AI and BMW for automotive collision simulation models.

title: 具身智能行业 5 月融资额环比降近六成
content: Embodied intelligence industry funding cooled in May 2026: 51 deals raised 8.6 billion yuan, up 147% year-over-year but down 59% month-over-month. The shift from hype to rational assessment reflects the technology's early stage and unsettled technical approaches. Investment is moving from complete robots toward core components, data infrastructure, and non-humanoid applications like low-altitude and deep-sea scenarios.
